name: Cocoa Branana Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and cocoa powder. Set aside.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine All-bran cereal and milk. Let stand for 5 minutes or until the cereal softens. Add egg whites and oil. Beat well. Stir in bananas. Add flour mixture, stirring only until combined.
3. Portion batter evenly into twelve 2-1/2-inch muffin pan cups coated with cooking spray.
4. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for about 25 minutes or until lightly browned. Serve warm.
